acceptance_criteria.given: a valid sentinel with allowed_operations containing {"op":"Write","target":"/tmp/allowed.json"} and correct session_id
acceptance_criteria.then: the function returns a non-None dict with op=="Write" and target=="/tmp/allowed.json"

check.note: Matcher-only test; hand-craft sentinel directly (valid regardless of writer fix)

acceptance_criteria.given: a valid sentinel with allowed_operations containing {"op":"Write","target":"/tmp/allowed.json"} and correct session_id
a valid sentinel with {"op":"Write","target":"/tmp/allowed.json"} and posttool-allowlist-consume.py receives Write PostToolUse event with tool_input.file_path=="/tmp/allowed.json"
acceptance_criteria.then: consume_sentinel_grant_on_terminal_result is called and the sentinel file at /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json is unlinked

acceptance_criteria.given: a legacy broken-schema sentinel with {"op":"Write","args_contain":["/specific/path"]} (no target field)
acceptance_criteria.then: the function returns None (exact equality required for args_contain fallback, no substring matching)

acceptance_criteria.given: a legacy broken-schema sentinel with {"op":"Write","args_contain":["/specific/path"]} (no target field)
acceptance_criteria.then: (a) returns non-None; (b) returns None; (c) returns None — path-prefix substring must not match

acceptance_criteria.given: a sentinel with {"op":"Write"} only — no target, no args_contain (intentional wildcard shape produced by bare /allow Write)
acceptance_criteria.then: the function returns non-None (intentional wildcard preserved for bare Write grant)

acceptance_criteria.given: userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh is invoked as a subprocess with hook JSON payload {"prompt":"/allow --tool \"Write /tmp/file.json\"","session_id":"<sid>"} piped to stdin, with CLAUDE_TASK_ID env var set
acceptance_criteria.then: the sentinel file at /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json EXISTS AND allowed_operations[0] has op=="Write" and target=="/tmp/file.json" (NOT args_contain, NOT missing sentinel) AND match_sentinel_grant_for_write(task_id, sid, "/tmp/file.json") returns non-None AND match_sentinel_grant_for_write(task_id, sid, "/tmp/other.json") returns None

acceptance_criteria.given: userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh is invoked as a subprocess with hook JSON payload {"prompt":"/allow Write /tmp/file.json","session_id":"<sid>"} piped to stdin, with CLAUDE_TASK_ID env var set (bare syntax, no --tool flag)
acceptance_criteria.then: the sentinel file at /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json EXISTS AND allowed_operations[0] has op=="Write" and target=="/tmp/file.json" (NOT a bare wildcard {op:Write}) AND match_sentinel_grant_for_write(task_id, sid, "/tmp/file.json") returns non-None AND match_sentinel_grant_for_write(task_id, sid, "/tmp/other.json") returns None
